sentences: 他打算用它来做视频剪辑。
refs: He plans to use it for video editing.
He is very satisfied with this purchase.

sentences: 客户上周提交了一个工单。
我们的工程师已经定位了问题。
他们将在今天部署修复。
refs: The customer filed a ticket last week.
Our engineer has already located the problem.
They will deploy the fix today.
Afterwards the customer will be notified to verify it.

sentences: 然后检索器召回相关文档。
整个流程在一秒内完成。
refs: Then the retriever recalls relevant documents.
Finally the generator produces an answer.
The whole pipeline finishes within one second.

sentences: The team merged the feature branch yesterday.
It passed all the unit tests.
They deployed it to staging this morning.
They will promote it to production tomorrow.
refs: 团队昨天合并了功能分支。
它通过了所有单元测试。
他们今天上午把它部署到了预发布环境。
他们明天会把它推到生产环境。
